text: Gain CP for the construction of your zoo.
notes: 1 point each for connecting all water, rock or border spaces; 1 point for covering the zoo map

text: Gain CP for empty buiding spaces in your zoo.

name: Favorite Zoo

text: Gain CP for large animals in your zoo.

text: Gain CP for supporting conservation projects.
name: Conservation Zoo

text: Gain CP for Sponsor cards in your zoo.

text: Gain 1 CP for each Animal category icon of which you have more than the person to your right.

text: Gain CP for rock icons in your zoo.
name: Climbing Park

text: Gain CP for water icons in your zoo.

text: Gain CP for different shaped Buildings in your zoo
name: Designer Zoo

text: Choose 1 Animal icon you did NOT support a base CP with. Gain CP for those icons.
name: Specialized Species Zoo

text: Gain CP for sets of Kiosk + Pavillion
notes: Do not have to be adjacent

name: Accessible Zoo

text: Gain 1 CP for each Continent icon of which you have more than the person to your right.
name: International Zoo

text: Draw a card Deck/Reputation / Income: 1 card D/R / 3/6 Research Icons : 1/2 CP
name: Science Lab

text: Play Research Icon : 1 Reputation
name: Spokesperson

text: 1/2/3 Universities : $2/$5/$10 / 3 Universities : 1 CP
name: Veterinarian

text: # Research icons : $2 each / Play Research Icon : 1 CP
name: Science Museum

text: 2 Reputation; 1 CP
name: Gorilla Field Research

text: # Conservation Projects : 2 Appeal each / Income: Gain 1 CP
name: Medical Breakthrough

text: 1 X-token / Income: 1 X-token / 3 Universities : 1 CP
name: Technology Institute

text: # Americas icons : 1 Appeal each / Play Americas icon : free Kiosk / 5 Kiosks : 1 CP
name: Expert on the Americas

text: # Europe icons : 1 Appeal each / Play Europe icon : free 1-space enclosure / 5 1-space enclosures : 1 CP
name: Expert on Europe

text: # Australia icons : 1 Appeal each / Play Australia icon : pouch 1 card from hand for 2 Appeal
name: Expert on Australia

text: # Asia icons : 1 Appeal each / Play Asia icon : free Pavilion
name: Expert on Asia

text: # Africa icons : 1 Appeal each / Play Africa icon : Clever (move an action card to space 1) / # X-tokens : 1 Appeal each
name: Expert on Africa

text: Discard token from card to use as any icon when playing a base conservation project. / 5 supported conservation projects : 1 CP
name: Global Breeding Program

text: 1 Associate / 9 Reputation : 1 CP
name: Talented Communicator

text: Build a second building of the same kind each time you use the Build action. / Zoo map completely covered : 5 Appeal
name: Engineer

text: Discard token from card to use as any icon when playing a base conservation project. / 5 supported conservation projects : 1 CP
name: Breeding Program

text: # water & rock icons : $2 each / May cover rock & water spaces; ignore rock & water requirements / each pair water & rock icons : 2 Appeal
name: Diversity Researcher

text: 3 / Income: $3 / 9 Reputation : 1 CP
name: Federal Grants

text: When border space placement bonus taken, gain another free placement bonus / All border spaces covered : 1 CP
name: Archeologist

text: # Research icons : 1 CP (other players gain $2 per CP gained)
name: Release of Patents

text: 1 X-token / Each Release into the Wild conservation project : 1 CP; you may support each CP more than once.
name: Migration Recordings

text: # Small Animals played : $2 each / Each time you play only Small Animals with the Animals action, play another SA and take 1 from the display
name: Waza Small Animals Program

text: # Small Animals played : 1 Appeal each / Cost to play Small Animals is reduced by $3
name: Expert in Small Animals

text: # Large Animals played : 2 Appeal each / Cost to play Large Animals is reduced by $4
name: Expert in Large Animals

text: # Primate icons : 1 Appeal each / Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Primates in your zoo.
name: Sponsorship: Primates

text: # Reptile icons : 1 Appeal each / Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Reptiles in your zoo.
name: Sponsorship: Reptiles

text: # Bird icons : 1 Appeal each / Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Bird in your zoo.
name: Sponsorship: Vultures

text: # Predator icons : 1 Appeal each / Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Predator in your zoo.
name: Sponsorship: Lions

text: # Herbavore icons : 1 Appeal each / Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Herbavore in your zoo.
name: Sponsorship: Elephants

text: Each time a Primate icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3
name: Primatologist

text: Each time a Reptile icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3
name: Herpetologist

text: Each time a Bird icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3
name: Ornithologist

text: Each time a Predator icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3
name: Expert in Predators

text: Each time a Herbavore icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3
name: Expert in Herbavores

text: # Water icons : 1 Appeal each / Gain $1 for each space covered next to water / All Water spaces connected : 1 CP
name: Hydrologist

text: for every 2 Rock icons : 3 Appeal / Gain $1 for each space covered next to rocks / All Rock spaces connected : 1 CP
name: Geologist

text: Place the Meerkat Den special tile next to at least 1 Rock / Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Herbivore icon / 6 Herbivore icons : 1 CP
name: Meerkat Den

text: Place the Penguin Pool special tile next to at least 1 Water / Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Bird icon / 6 Bird icons : 1 CP
name: Penguin Pool

text: Place the Aquarium special tile next to at least 2 Water / Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Water icon / 6 Water icons : 1 CP
name: Aquarium

text: Place the Aerial Cableway special tile next to at least 2 Rocks / Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Rock icon / 6 Rock icons : 1 CP
name: Aerial Cableway

text: Place the Baboon Rock special tile next to at least 1 Rock / Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Primate icon / 6 Primate icons : 1 CP
name: Baboon Rock

text: Place the Rhesus Monkey Park special tile / Gain 1 X-token each time you play a Primate icon
name: Rhesus Monkey Park

text: Place the Barred Owl Hut special tile / Draw 2 cards and keep 1 each time you play a Bird icon (Perception 2)
name: Barred Owl Hut

text: Place the Polar Bear Exhibit special tile next to at least 1 Water / Each time a Bear icon is played in ANY zoo, gain 2 Appeal / for 3/6 Bear icons : 1/2 CP
name: Polar Bear Exhibit

text: Place the Spotted Hyena Compound special tile next to at least 1 Rock / Play a Predator icon, reveal X # of cards & add 1 Animal to your hand with X=# of your Predator icons (Hunter X)
name: Spotted Hyena Compound

text: Place the Okapi Stable special tile / Up to 3 times, when you play a Herbivore icon, play a Sponsor for $X where X=the card strength
name: Okapi Stable

text: Place the Zoo School special tile on at least 2 border spaces; take 1 card deck/reputation; gain 1 Reputation + 1 CP
name: Zoo School

text: Place the Adventure Playground special tile next to at least 1 Rock; gain 4 Appeal
name: Adventure Playground

text: Place the Water Playground special tile next to at least 1 Water; gain 4 Appeal
name: Water Playground

text: Place the Side Entrance special tile on 2 border spaces (need not be adjacent to other buildings) / Income: Gain $2 per Building(except empty standard enclosures) next to this tile / Zoo map completely covered : 5 Appeal
name: Side Entrance

text: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Water space / Each isolated Water space : 1 CP
name: Native Seabirds

text: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Rock space / Each isolated Rock space : 1 CP
name: Native Lizards

text: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Border space without Buildings / Each group of 6 spaces without Buildings : 1 CP
name: Native Farm Animals

text: Gain $2 for each different Continent and Animal icon in your zoo / Each time you gain a Continent or Animal icon not in your zoo, gain 1 Appeal + $2
name: Explorer

text: Place a 5-space enclosure for free / If you play a Large Animal, you may ignore 1 condition of your choice.
name: Waza Large Animal Program

text: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected space with a placement Bonus / every 2 isolated spaces with a placement Bonus : 1 CP
name: Free-Range New World Monkeys

text: 1 CP per 2 different continent/animal icons; others get $2 for each CP you earn
name: Basic Research*

text: # Research icons : 1 Appeal each / ANY Research icon played : $2 / 5 different Animal icons : 1 CP
name: Science Library*

text: 1 X-token / Venom, Constriction, Hypnosis & Pilfering do not affect you / 5 different Continent icons : 1 CP
name: Quarantine Lab*

text: 2 Reputation / 5 different Continent icons : 1 CP
name: Foreign Institute*

text: Choose Small or Large Animals; reveal cards from deck and add the first of the chosen type to hand / You can no longer play the other (unchosen) animal type; gain 2 Appeal per Small, or 4 Appeal per Large Animal played.
name: Waza Special Assignment*

text: Place the Sea Turtle Tank special tile next to at least 1 Water / Sell up to 2 cards for $4 each when you play a Reptile icon (Sunbathing 2)
name: Sea Turtle Tank*

text: 1 Appeal + 1 CP / 5 different Animal icons : 1 CP
name: Guided School Toours*

text: 1 Kiosk / Income: $1 per Kiosk all other players have in their zoos / 5 Kiosks: 1 CP
name: Franchise Business

text: Each time a Sea Animal icon is playes into ANY zoo, gain$3
name: Marine Biologist

text: 1/3/5 Appeal for 1/4/7 Kiosks and/or Pavillions / 1 CP per Kiosk with 3 empty spaces adjacent; Max 3 CP
name: Farm Cat

text: $2/$5/$10 per 1/3/5 Europe icons / Each time you play a Europe icon into YOUR zoo, you may mark 1 Animal card / 3 Donations : 1 CP
name: Conference on Europe

text: Each time you play an Australia icon into YOUR zoo, you may increase the size of a standard enclosure by 1 for free. If the enclosure is occupied, gain 2 Appeal. / Gain 1 Appeal for each Pouched card in your zoo.
name: Conference on Australia

text: Each time you play a Sea Animal icon into YOUR zoo, choose 1: Expedition OR Scuba Dive 1
name: Marine Research Expedition

text: Place Excavation Site tile; gain placement bonuses twice for this building / All placement bonuses on zoo are covered: 1 CP
name: Excavation Site

text: Gain 1 3-space standard enclosure / Treat all 3-space enclosures on a border space as 5-space enclosures / All border spaces are covered: 1 CP
name: Expansion Area

text: Make 1 Donation (you do not need to have your Association Action card upgraded) / When making a Donation, pay $1 less for each Science icon in your zoo.
name: Publications

text: Place Mascot Statue tile; Gain 1 Appeal / Income: 1 Appeal / Gain 2 Appeal for each zoo with higher Appeal (score last)
name: Mascot Statue

text: Search the Discard pile for and 1 Petting Zoo Animal. / Each time a Petting Zoo Animal is playes into ANY zoo, gain $2.
name: Horse Whisperer

text: Gain 1 Pavillion; Gain 1 Appeal for every Pavillion in your zoo. / Each time you build a Pavillion in your zoo, gain 1 X-marker (max. 1 per action)
name: Landscape Gardener

text: Gain 3 Reputation
name: Field Research Type D Orcas

text: Place Amazon House tile next to at least 1 Rock + 1 Water space; gain 1 Reputation + 2 CP + 4 Appeal
name: Amazon House

text: Place Underwater Tunnel tile on 2 Water spaces; Gain 2 Appeal / This tile can accommodate Sea Animals (max. 2 markers) / Gain 3/5 Appeal for 1/2 Aquariua adjacent to Underwater Tunnel
name: Underwater Tunnel

text: You may reposition up to 3 buildings and place 1 free Kiosk + 1 free Pavillion / Do not gain placement bonuses anymore / Zoo map completely covered : 5 Appeal
name: Reconstruction
